summary: Premium modern restaurant website for Healthy Yummy Bites - a café-style fast food restaurant in Apampur, Punjab, India
architectural_notes: Single-page restaurant website with smooth scrolling navigation
Premium design system: warm café colors (cream, orange, black), glassmorphism effects, soft shadows, 3D depth
Google Maps embed for location display
Shopping cart uses localStorage for persistence across page reloads
Checkout sends formatted order details to WhatsApp (wa.me/919023031429) via URL
known_issues: White screen on load — likely a runtime error in the shopping cart system (CartContext, CartPanel, or CheckoutModal)

existing_features.title: Create a hero section with business name 'Healthy Yummy Bites', tagline 'Fresh • Tasty • Healthy Fast Food', food imagery background, and two animated CTA buttons: 'Order on WhatsApp' linking to https://wa.me/919023031429 and 'View Menu' scrolling to menu section

Create an About section with the text: 'Healthy Yummy Bites is a modern café-style fast food spot in Apampur offering fresh burgers, wraps, pizzas, shakes, mojitos, and snacks made with quality ingredients and great taste.'

Create a comprehensive menu section with categorized menu items displayed in visually attractive cards with icons. Categories include: Shakes (Cold Coffee ₹90, Vanilla ₹100, Chocolate ₹100, Strawberry ₹100, Pineapple ₹100, Banana ₹100, Butterscotch ₹100, Blueberry ₹100, Black Currant ₹100, Oreo Shake ₹100), Mojito (Mint ₹60, Peach ₹60, Watermelon ₹60, Passion Fruit ₹60, Green Apple ₹60, Lime Soda ₹40, Masala Soda ₹40), Coffee (Small ₹30, Large ₹50), Burger (Veg Burger ₹40, Macroni Burger ₹50, Spicy Cheese Burger ₹80, HYB Veg Special Burger ₹80, Spicy Chicken Burger ₹80, HYB Special Chicken Burger ₹90), French Fries (Classic Fries ₹80, Peri Peri Fries ₹100), Salad (Veg Salad ₹80, Paneer Salad ₹100, Chicken Salad ₹120), Wraps (Aloo Tikki ₹60, Paneer ₹70, Chicken Patty ₹80, Chicken Wrap ₹100), Sandwich (Cold ₹60, Veg Grilled ₹70, Paneer Tandoori ₹80, Paneer Makhani ₹80, Cheese Corn ₹80, Chicken Tandoori ₹80, Chicken Makhani ₹80, Extra Cheese ₹20), Pizza (Onion ₹90/₹170, Margherita ₹90/₹170, Mix Veggies ₹100/₹180, Cheese Corn ₹130/₹200, Paneer ₹150/₹250, Veg Loaded ₹170/₹280, Chicken ₹170/₹280), and Spring Roll (1 Piece ₹20, 2 Piece ₹40)
Create a gallery section displaying high-quality appetizing food images for burgers, pizza, shakes, wraps, and fries

Create a location and contact section displaying address '📍 Apampur, Punjab', phone number '📞 +91 90230 31429', WhatsApp order button linking to https://wa.me/919023031429, hours 'Open daily', and a Google Maps embed placeholder
Create a customer reviews section with three sample 5-star reviews: 'Best burgers and shakes in the area!', 'Affordable prices and amazing taste.', and 'Perfect place for snacks and coffee.'
Create a prominent Order CTA section with heading 'Hungry? Order Now!' and two buttons: 'Order on WhatsApp' linking to https://wa.me/919023031429 and 'Call Now' linking to tel:+919023031429

Implement premium design system with warm café colors (cream, orange, black accents), soft shadows and depth effects, modern typography, glassmorphism effects, subtle 3D depth, smooth animations on scroll and hover, clean spacing, and premium layout throughout the entire website
Implement mobile-first responsive design with fast loading, clean mobile layout, sticky order button visible on mobile scroll, and tap-to-call functionality enabled for phone numbers
Create a premium footer with copyright text '© Healthy Yummy Bites' and tagline 'Fresh Taste • Great Value'
Implement smooth scrolling throughout the website, hover animations on interactive elements, menu card shadows, and subtle 3D depth effects as premium touches
Optimize page metadata and content for local SEO targeting keywords: 'Healthy Yummy Bites Apampur', 'Best cafe in Apampur', 'Best fast food in Apampur', and 'Burger pizza cafe Punjab'

Create a CartContext (React context + localStorage persistence) that stores cart items (item name, price, quantity), exposes addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, and computed totalPrice and totalItems. Persist cart state to localStorage under key 'hyb-cart' so it survives page reloads.

Add an 'Add to Cart' button below each menu item in MenuSection.tsx. When clicked, the item (name and price) is added to the cart via CartContext. If the item already exists in the cart, increment its quantity by 1. Style the button consistently with the existing premium warm cafe design system (orange accent color, rounded, hover animation).

Add a persistent cart icon button in the top-right corner of the page (fixed position, visible on both desktop and mobile). Display a red badge showing the total number of items in the cart. The badge should hide when the cart is empty. Clicking the icon opens the cart panel.

Create a CartPanel component (slide-in drawer or modal overlay) that opens when the cart icon is clicked. It must display: a list of all cart items with name, unit price, and quantity; quantity controls (plus and minus buttons) per item that update the cart; a remove button per item; the running total price in rupees; and a 'Place Order' button at the bottom. An empty state message should be shown when the cart has no items. Style with glassmorphism and warm cafe color palette.

Create a CheckoutModal component that opens as a popup when the 'Place Order' button is clicked. The form must collect: Name (text input), Phone Number (tel input), Address (textarea), and Payment Method (read-only field pre-set to 'Cash on Delivery'). Include 'Confirm Order' and 'Cancel' buttons. Validate that Name, Phone, and Address are non-empty before submission. Style with glassmorphism overlay matching the premium design system.

On checkout form submission, construct a WhatsApp message pre-filled with the order details and open it via https://wa.me/919023031429. The message must follow this format: 'New Order: Name: {name}, Phone: {phone}, Address: {address}, Items: {quantity} x {itemName} - Rs{lineTotal} each, Total: Rs{totalPrice}, Payment: Cash on Delivery'. After opening the WhatsApp link, clear the cart via clearCart and close both the CheckoutModal and CartPanel.

Ensure the entire shopping cart system (cart icon, CartPanel drawer, CheckoutModal) is fully mobile responsive. The CartPanel should be a full-width bottom sheet or side drawer on mobile. The CheckoutModal should be full-screen on small viewports. All touch targets (buttons, quantity controls) must be at least 44x44px. The cart icon badge must be clearly visible on small screens.

Debug and fix the runtime error causing a white screen on load. Audit App.tsx, CartContext.tsx, CartPanel.tsx, CheckoutModal.tsx, and CartIcon.tsx for any JavaScript/TypeScript errors such as: missing or incorrect CartProvider wrapping in the component tree, context being consumed outside its provider, invalid destructuring of context values, missing default values in CartContext, import/export mismatches, or any unhandled exceptions during initial render. Ensure CartProvider wraps all components that consume CartContext in App.tsx or main.tsx (without modifying main.tsx or other immutable files). Add a fallback default context value so the app does not crash if context is accessed before the provider mounts.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with logo, tagline, food imagery background, and WhatsApp/Menu CTA buttons
Menu section with categorized items (Shakes, Mojito, Coffee, Burger, Fries, Salad, Wraps, Sandwich, Pizza, Spring Roll) with prices
Gallery section with appetizing food images (burgers, pizza, shakes, wraps, fries)
Location & Contact section with address, phone, WhatsApp button, hours, and Google Maps embed
Customer reviews section with sample 5-star reviews
Order CTA section with WhatsApp and Call Now buttons
Premium design with warm café colors, glassmorphism, 3D depth, smooth animations, and hover effects
Mobile optimization with fast loading, sticky order button, and tap-to-call
Local SEO optimization for Apampur cafe and fast food searches

Shopping cart system: Add to Cart buttons on each menu item, cart icon with item count in top-right, cart panel with quantity controls and total price, Place Order button, checkout form popup (Name, Phone, Address, Cash on Delivery), WhatsApp order submission with cart details, cart clear after order, localStorage persistence, fully mobile responsive
